# CameraOff

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CameraOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CameraOff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
photo, webcam, video

## Categories
photography, devices, communication

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/camera-off)
